item.title: Harvesting With the Biggest Combine
item.description: Laura Farms shares a harvest day with the world’s biggest combine, showing the scale and teamwork behind getting the crop in.

media:content.media:title: Harvesting With the Biggest Combine
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a harvest day with the world’s biggest combine, showing the scale and teamwork behind getting the crop in.

item.title: Our Plan for the $850K Property
item.description: Laura Farms shares the plan for their new $850K property and what comes next on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Our Plan for the $850K Property
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares the plan for their new $850K property and what comes next on the farm.

item.title: Restoring Old Farm Equipment for Work
item.description: Laura Farms restores old equipment and gets it ready to farm with a 1960s feel. A hands-on look at practical work, teamwork, and rural life.

media:content.media:title: Restoring Old Farm Equipment for Work
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms restores old equipment and gets it ready to farm with a 1960s feel. A hands-on look at practical work, teamwork, and rural life.

item.title: Farming a Secret Field
item.description: Laura Farms takes on a secret field and gets the job done with a practical, hands-on approach to farm work.

media:content.media:title: Farming a Secret Field
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes on a secret field and gets the job done with a practical, hands-on approach to farm work.

item.title: The Hagie Is Ready to Roll
item.description: Laura Farms gets the Hagie ready to roll, keeping the work moving on the farm with a practical, hands-on approach.

media:content.media:title: The Hagie Is Ready to Roll
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms gets the Hagie ready to roll, keeping the work moving on the farm with a practical, hands-on approach.

item.title: The Oldest Tractor I've Ever Seen!
item.description: Laura Farms shares a look at the oldest tractor they've ever seen, a simple farm moment that highlights the machines and history behind rural life.

media:content.media:title: The Oldest Tractor I've Ever Seen!
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a look at the oldest tractor they've ever seen, a simple farm moment that highlights the machines and history behind rural life.

item.title: Upgrading the Pivot Repair Rig
item.description: Laura Farms upgrades the pivot repair rig, keeping the farm moving with practical improvements and hands-on work.

media:content.media:title: Upgrading the Pivot Repair Rig
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms upgrades the pivot repair rig, keeping the farm moving with practical improvements and hands-on work.

item.title: We Remodeled Our Lawn
item.description: Laura Farms shares a fresh lawn remodel, bringing farm life and machinery into a hands-on project with a positive, practical finish.

media:content.media:title: We Remodeled Our Lawn
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares a fresh lawn remodel, bringing farm life and machinery into a hands-on project with a positive, practical finish.

item.title: Runaway Bull Hiding in the Brush
item.description: Laura Farms shares the search for a runaway bull hiding in the brush, a real farm moment that calls for patience, teamwork, and steady hands.

media:content.media:title: Runaway Bull Hiding in the Brush
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shares the search for a runaway bull hiding in the brush, a real farm moment that calls for patience, teamwork, and steady hands.
